stackConfig.stackChoiceComment: REVERTED to flux-photoreal because Fal does not have an SDXL LoRA training endpoint (only inference). The earlier sdxl-stylized config pointed at fal-ai/fast-sdxl-lora-training which doesn't exist — training submissions returned 'Not Found'. Bank stays as the on-canon image source for Spurdo regardless. Generation via FLUX produces polished cartoon output (off-canon) but at least training works. To eventually use SDXL stack: source a Spurdo identity LoRA from an external SDXL trainer (Replicate, civitai trainer, etc.) and add the URL via a future BYO-LoRA-URL flow.

sdxlStackConfigArchived.comment: Saved here for when SDXL training story is sorted (external trainers + BYO URL). Inference endpoint fal-ai/lora is a real working Fal endpoint that supports SDXL with stacked LoRAs. The defaultStyleLoras would re-attach: huggingface.co/victor/MSpaint/SDXL_MSPaint_Portrait.safetensors (MSPaint trigger word, scale 0.9). Quality tags: score_9, score_8_up, score_7_up. Negative tags include 'photo, photorealistic, 3d render, smooth shading, anime, vector'. Guidance 7.0, steps 30.

allowedProvidersComment: Bank stays as the on-canon source. Custom upload for one-offs. Fal now routes through flux-photoreal (training works, output is cartoon-polish — fine because bank covers actual posts).
lockedPromptTemplate: spurdo spärde meme drawn in early internet MS Paint style. brown rounded bean-shaped head, cream/yellow long oval mouth-muzzle area, tiny black dot eyes, big pink open smile, weird stretched face proportions, simple cartoon body that's stiff or awkward, oversized floppy hands, simple black-blob feet. Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges, no clean vector curves, looks slightly messy and amateur like it was drawn fast with a mouse in 2008. FLAT solid colors only — NO gradients, NO realistic lighting, NO shading. Set in [SCENE]. Low-resolution screenshot-like feel, meme-panel crop, simple flat background, imperfect anatomy. NOT polished, NOT vector, NOT 3D, NOT anime, NOT photorealistic, NOT cell-shaded, NOT modern digital art. NO text, NO logos, NO watermarks.
lockedPromptTemplateTags: mspaint, brown bear character, simple drawing, MS Paint style, amateur drawing, wobbly lines, flat colors, cream muzzle, tiny black dot eyes, pink open smile, thick black outlines, [SCENE], low quality on purpose, 2008 internet art, screenshot-like

pure_reactions: a flat plain off-white background with no scene, just spurdo centered as a portrait
a flat 4chan-green colored background with no scene at all
a plain white background, just spurdo small in the center
scene_vignettes: a candlelit Finnish sauna interior with wooden walls and steam rising
a snowy Finnish forest at dusk with dark pine trees and low light
a fluorescent-lit Finnish supermarket aisle photo with linoleum floor and shelves of unlabeled products
a green grassy field with a Koskenkorva vodka bottle next to him
a kitchen counter with a plate of black salmiakki licorice candy
a wooden Finnish mökki cabin interior at night with a single oil lamp on a table
a winter scene with snow falling and a frozen lake behind him
a small rowboat on a still lake at midsummer with the sun barely below the horizon
broken_observations: a desk with a glowing CRT monitor showing a candlestick chart with squiggly red and green lines
a flat off-white background, spurdo holding a wooden sign that has nothing written on it
a beige room with a single chair, spurdo just standing there
a pixelated 2008-era webpage screenshot, spurdo pasted on top
finnish_absurdity: midsummer at 3am, sun barely below horizon, dim grey sky, lakeside
a Finnish supermarket with shelves of energy drinks, harsh fluorescent light
a wooden sauna bench with a Koskenkorva bottle and a single salmiakki candy
a dark kitchen at 4pm in winter, only a window letting in grey light
gm_grin: a Finnish kitchen window with weak morning sun, snow outside
a forest path at sunrise with low golden light
spurdo waking up in a wooden bed in a mökki, dim morning light
gn_grin: a starry winter sky over a frozen Finnish lake, no aurora
a single oil lamp burning out in a wooden cabin
spurdo tucked into a wooden bed with a knit blanket, dim moonlight

hardExclusions: Spurdo in any Nazi/SS/extremist uniform or with extremist symbols
Spurdo with modern photo filters (bloom, HDR, teal-orange grading)
Multiple Spurdos in one image (unless explicitly a comic panel)
Text, logos, or tickers inside images
visualCanonChecklist: BROWN rounded bean-shaped head (not round teddy-bear, not anime)
Tiny black dot eyes (no white highlights, no anime sparkles)
Weird stretched face proportions — imperfect on purpose
Thick uneven black outlines, wobbly hand-drawn edges
FLAT solid colors only — no gradients, no shading, no realistic lighting
If body shown: stiff/awkward pose, oversized hands, blob feet
